title: Plain and Reinforced Concrete – Code of Practice
description: Specifies requirements for design and construction of plain and reinforced concrete structures, covering materials, workmanship, inspection and testing.
notes: Most widely used concrete design code in India. Follows limit state design method.

title: Code of Practice for Design Loads – Dead Loads
description: Specifies unit weights of building materials and stored materials for computing dead loads on structures.
notes: Part of the IS 875 series covering all types of design loads.

title: Code of Practice for Design Loads – Imposed Loads
description: Specifies imposed (live) loads for floors, roofs and other surfaces of buildings for structural design.
notes: Tabulates imposed loads for various occupancy types.

title: Code of Practice for Design Loads – Wind Loads
description: Gives wind speed data and methods to calculate wind pressure on buildings and structures.
notes: Revised in 2015 with updated wind speed maps of India.

title: Code of Practice for Design Loads – Snow Loads
description: Covers snow load considerations for roofs of buildings located in snowfall regions.
notes: Applicable primarily to buildings in northern hilly regions of India.

title: Code of Practice for Design Loads – Special Loads and Combinations
description: Covers special loads including thermal loads, fatigue loads, erection loads and load combinations.
notes: Used alongside other parts of IS 875 for comprehensive load analysis.

title: Concrete Mix Proportioning – Guidelines
description: Provides guidelines for proportioning concrete mixes to achieve desired workability, strength and durability.
notes: Revised in 2019 to include performance-based design approach.

title: Coarse and Fine Aggregate for Concrete – Specification
description: Specifies requirements for natural and crushed coarse and fine aggregates used in concrete.
notes: Revised in 2016 to include manufactured sand (M-Sand) specifications.

title: High Strength Deformed Steel Bars and Wires for Concrete Reinforcement – Specification
description: Specifies requirements for high strength deformed steel bars (Fe415, Fe500, Fe550, Fe600) used for reinforcing concrete.
notes: Fe500D and Fe550D grades include enhanced ductility requirements for seismic zones.

title: Mild Steel and Medium Tensile Steel Bars for Concrete Reinforcement
description: Specifies requirements for mild steel and medium tensile steel bars used in concrete reinforcement.
notes: Covers Fe250 grade plain round bars.

title: General Construction in Steel – Code of Practice
description: Comprehensive code for design, fabrication and erection of steel structures using limit state method.
notes: Revised in 2007 from working stress to limit state design method.

title: Hot Rolled Medium and High Tensile Structural Steel – Specification
description: Specifies requirements for hot rolled steel plates, strips, shapes and sections used in structural applications.
notes: Covers grades E250, E300, E350, E410, E450, E550.

title: Prestressed Concrete – Code of Practice
description: Covers design and construction of prestressed concrete structures including pre-tensioning and post-tensioning.
notes: Revised in 2012 with updated limit state design approach.

title: Concrete Structures for Storage of Liquids – Code of Practice (General)
description: Provides guidance for design of concrete structures used for storage of water and liquids.
notes: Revised in 2009 to align with limit state design philosophy.

title: Criteria for Earthquake Resistant Design – General Provisions and Buildings
description: Provides seismic zoning map and criteria for earthquake resistant design of buildings and structures.
notes: Revised in 2016. India divided into four seismic zones (II to V).

title: Ductile Design and Detailing of Reinforced Concrete Structures Subject to Seismic Forces
description: Specifies ductile detailing requirements for reinforced concrete members to ensure adequate seismic performance.
applications: RCC Buildings in Seismic Zones III, IV, V
notes: Mandatory for buildings in seismic zones III and above.

title: Earthquake Resistant Design and Construction of Buildings – Code of Practice
description: Covers earthquake resistant construction features for masonry, timber and RCC buildings.
applications: Low Rise Buildings in Seismic Zones
notes: Prescribes seismic bands and other construction features for masonry.

title: Improving Earthquake Resistance of Low Strength Masonry Buildings – Guidelines
description: Guidelines for improving seismic resistance of existing low strength masonry buildings.
notes: Especially useful for rural and semi-urban construction.

title: Design and Construction of Pile Foundations – Driven Cast In-situ Concrete Piles
description: Covers design and construction of driven cast-in-situ concrete pile foundations.
notes: Part of IS 2911 series covering all types of piles.

title: Design and Construction of Pile Foundations – Bored Cast In-situ Piles
description: Covers design and construction of bored cast-in-situ concrete pile foundations.
notes: Most commonly used pile type in Indian urban construction.

title: Determination of Breaking Capacity of Shallow Foundations
description: Provides methods to determine the ultimate bearing capacity of shallow foundations.
notes: Based on Terzaghi and Meyerhof bearing capacity theories.

title: Design and Construction of Foundations in Soils – General Requirements
description: Provides general requirements for design and construction of foundations in soils.
notes: General umbrella code for all foundation design in India.

title: Method of Load Test on Soils
description: Describes procedure for conducting plate load test on soils to determine bearing capacity and settlement.
notes: Plate load test is a direct field method to determine allowable bearing pressure.

title: Methods of Test for Soils – Preparation of Dry Soil Samples
description: Specifies method for preparation of dry soil samples for testing.
notes: Part of extensive IS 2720 series with 40+ parts covering all soil tests.

title: Methods of Test for Soils – Determination of Specific Gravity
description: Specifies methods for determination of specific gravity of soil solids.
notes: Uses pycnometer method for determining specific gravity.

title: Methods of Test for Soils – Grain Size Analysis
description: Specifies methods for determination of particle size distribution of soils.
notes: Covers both sieve analysis and hydrometer method.

title: Methods of Test for Soils – Atterberg Limits
description: Specifies methods for determination of liquid limit, plastic limit and shrinkage limit of soils.
notes: Casagrande apparatus used for liquid limit determination.

title: Methods of Test for Soils – Light Compaction (Proctor)
description: Specifies the standard Proctor compaction test to determine optimum moisture content and maximum dry density.
notes: Light compaction test. Heavy compaction covered in IS 2720 Part 8.

title: Methods of Test for Soils – Unconfined Compressive Strength
description: Specifies method for determination of unconfined compressive strength of cohesive soils.
notes: Quick and simple field/lab test for cohesive soil strength.

title: Methods of Test for Soils – Direct Shear Test
description: Specifies method for determination of shear strength parameters (c, φ) of soils using direct shear box.
notes: Provides drained and undrained shear strength parameters.

title: Classification and Identification of Soils for General Engineering Purposes
description: Provides the Indian Standard classification system for soils based on plasticity and grain size.
notes: Based on Unified Soil Classification System (USCS).

title: Methods of Tests for Strength of Concrete
description: Specifies methods for sampling fresh concrete, making, curing and testing concrete specimens for strength.
notes: 150mm cube specimens used for compressive strength testing in India.

title: Methods of Sampling and Analysis of Concrete
description: Specifies methods for sampling fresh concrete and testing for workability using slump, compaction factor and Vee-Bee tests.
notes: Slump test is the most commonly used workability test in India.

title: Methods of Test for Aggregates for Concrete
description: Specifies methods for testing physical and mechanical properties of aggregates used in concrete.
notes: Multi-part standard covering particle shape, size, mechanical properties and soundness.

title: Ordinary Portland Cement – Specification
description: Specifies requirements for Ordinary Portland Cement (OPC) 33 grade used in construction.
notes: 33 grade OPC. Higher grades covered in IS 8112 and IS 12269.

title: Ordinary Portland Cement 43 Grade – Specification
description: Specifies requirements for Ordinary Portland Cement of 43 grade.
notes: Most commonly used cement grade in Indian construction.

title: Ordinary Portland Cement 53 Grade – Specification
description: Specifies requirements for Ordinary Portland Cement of 53 grade with higher early and ultimate strength.
notes: Highest strength OPC grade. Used where early strength development is needed.

title: Portland Pozzolana Cement (Fly Ash Based) – Specification
description: Specifies requirements for Portland Pozzolana Cement made by intergrinding OPC clinker with fly ash.
notes: Preferred over OPC for marine and sulfate-resistant applications.

title: Portland Slag Cement – Specification
description: Specifies requirements for Portland Slag Cement made by intergrinding OPC clinker with granulated blast furnace slag.
notes: Good sulfate resistance. Lower heat of hydration than OPC.

title: Concrete Admixtures – Specification
description: Specifies requirements for chemical admixtures used in concrete including plasticizers, retarders and accelerators.
notes: Chemical admixtures can significantly improve workability and reduce w/c ratio.

title: Common Burnt Clay Building Bricks – Specification
description: Specifies requirements for common burnt clay bricks used in masonry construction including classification and testing.
notes: Classifies bricks into grades based on compressive strength.

title: Methods of Tests of Burnt Clay Building Bricks
description: Specifies methods of tests for burnt clay building bricks including compressive strength, water absorption and efflorescence.
notes: Standard test methods for evaluating brick quality.

title: Structural Use of Unreinforced Masonry – Code of Practice
description: Code for structural design of unreinforced load bearing masonry walls, columns and piers.
notes: Covers design of unreinforced masonry using working stress method.

title: Preparation and Use of Masonry Mortars – Code of Practice
description: Provides guidelines for preparation of mortar used in brick and stone masonry construction.
notes: Specifies mix proportions for different mortar grades.

title: Drinking Water – Specification
description: Specifies quality standards for drinking water including physical, chemical and bacteriological requirements.
notes: Aligned with WHO guidelines for drinking water quality.

title: Code of Basic Requirements for Water Supply, Drainage and Sanitation
description: Provides basic requirements for design of water supply and sanitation systems for buildings.
notes: Specifies per capita water demand for different uses.

title: Code of Practice for Building Drainage
description: Covers design and installation of drainage systems within and around buildings.
notes: Covers gravity drainage and ventilation of drainage systems.

title: Installation of Septic Tanks – Code of Practice (Design)
description: Provides design guidelines for septic tanks for treatment of domestic sewage.
notes: Commonly used where no public sewer system exists.

title: Code of Practice for Ancillary Structures in Sewerage System – Manholes
description: Specifies design and construction requirements for manholes in sewerage systems.
notes: Covers brick, stone and RCC manhole construction.

title: Design of Structural Timber in Building – Code of Practice
description: Provides design guidelines for structural timber members in buildings using working stress method.
notes: Covers design of beams, columns, connections in timber structures.

title: Recommendations for Maximum Permissible Moisture Content of Timber for Different End Uses
description: Specifies maximum permissible moisture content of timber for various applications.
notes: Controls moisture to prevent decay, warping and dimensional changes.

title: Code of Practice for Architectural and Building Drawings
description: Specifies conventions, symbols and methods for preparation of architectural and building drawings.
notes: Standard reference for drawing conventions in Indian construction.

title: Code of Practice for Fire Safety of Buildings (General) – General Principles of Fire Grading and Classification
description: Provides general principles for fire grading and classification of buildings.
notes: First in a series of fire safety codes for buildings.

title: Safety Code for Scaffolds and Ladders – Scaffolds
description: Provides safety requirements for design and erection of scaffolding for construction work.
notes: Essential for safe working at height during construction.

title: Recommendations on Stacking and Storage of Construction Materials at Site
description: Provides guidelines for proper stacking, storage and handling of construction materials at site.
notes: Helps prevent material deterioration and site accidents.

title: Ready Mixed Concrete – Code of Practice
description: Covers requirements for production, delivery and testing of ready mixed concrete (RMC).
notes: RMC ensures consistent quality and faster construction.

title: Method of Making, Curing and Determining Compressive Strength of Accelerated Cured Concrete Test Specimens
description: Specifies method for accelerated curing of concrete test specimens to predict 28-day strength.
notes: Allows strength assessment in shorter duration (24-28 hours).

title: Specification for Concrete Roofing Tiles
description: Specifies requirements for concrete roofing tiles including dimensions, strength and water absorption.
notes: Alternative to clay tiles with better durability.

title: Code of Practice for Use of Metal Arc Welding for General Construction in Mild Steel
description: Covers requirements for metal arc welding of mild steel for general construction purposes.
notes: Covers qualification, procedure and inspection of welds.

title: Standard Specifications and Code of Practice for Road Bridges – Loads and Load Combinations
description: Specifies standard vehicle loadings (IRC Class AA, A, B) and load combinations for road bridges in India.
notes: IRC Class AA tracked and wheeled vehicles are standard design vehicles.

title: Standard Specifications and Code of Practice for Road Bridges – Cement Concrete Bridges
description: Covers design requirements for plain and reinforced concrete road bridges.
notes: Now largely superseded by IRC 112 for new bridges.

title: Guidelines for Design of Flexible Pavements
description: Provides design procedures for flexible (bituminous) pavements based on traffic volume and subgrade strength.
notes: Revised in 2018 with mechanistic-empirical design approach.

title: Guidelines for Design of Plain Jointed Rigid Pavements for Highways
description: Provides design procedures for plain cement concrete (rigid) pavements for highways.
notes: Revised in 2015 with updated fatigue and temperature considerations.

title: Geometric Design Standards for Rural (Non-Urban) Highways
description: Provides geometric design standards for alignment, cross-section, junctions and grade for rural highways.
notes: Covers design speed, sight distance, horizontal and vertical curves.

title: Standard Specifications and Code of Practice for Road Bridges – Foundation and Substructure
description: Covers design requirements for foundations and substructure of road bridges including piers, abutments and pile foundations.
notes: Covers pile, well, open and raft foundations for bridges.

title: Standard Specifications and Code of Practice for Road Bridges – Bearings
description: Covers design and installation of elastomeric, PTFE and metallic bearings for road bridges.
notes: Multi-part code covering different types of bridge bearings.

title: Code of Practice for Concrete Road Bridges
description: Comprehensive limit state design code for concrete road bridges covering all aspects of design and detailing.
notes: Modern code aligned with Eurocodes replacing IRC 21 and IRC 18.

title: Guidelines for Pedestrian Facilities
description: Provides guidelines for design and provision of pedestrian facilities along and across roads.
notes: Includes provisions for differently-abled persons.

title: Standard Specifications and Code of Practice for Construction of Concrete Roads
description: Specifies construction procedures, materials and quality control for concrete road pavements.
notes: Covers formwork, concrete placement, curing and joint sealing.

title: Design Criteria for Prestressed Concrete Road Bridges
description: Provides design criteria for prestressed concrete road bridges (now largely superseded by IRC 112).
notes: Largely replaced by IRC 112 for new bridge designs.

title: Code of Practice for Road Markings
description: Covers materials, dimensions and applications of road markings including lane lines, stop lines and arrows.
notes: Yellow and white markings differentiated for different purposes.

title: Guidelines on Regulation and Control of Mixed Traffic in Urban Areas
description: Provides guidelines for traffic management and regulation in urban areas with mixed traffic.
notes: Addresses unique challenges of Indian mixed traffic conditions.

title: National Building Code of India 2016
description: Comprehensive model building code providing guidelines for design, construction, materials, and safety of buildings across India.
notes: Multi-volume code covering all aspects of building construction. Updated in 2016.

title: Design Aids for Reinforced Concrete to IS 456
description: Provides design charts, tables and interaction diagrams for reinforced concrete design as per IS 456.
notes: Widely used design handbook for quick reference without detailed calculations.

title: Handbook on Concrete Reinforcement and Detailing
description: Provides practical guidance on reinforcement detailing for various RCC elements as per IS 456.
notes: Essential reference for site engineers and draftsmen.

title: Explanatory Handbook on IS 456
description: Provides clause-by-clause explanation and commentary on IS 456 with worked examples.
notes: Best companion document to IS 456 for understanding intent of clauses.

title: Handbook on Building Construction Practices
description: Comprehensive handbook covering practical aspects of building construction materials and methods.
notes: Practical reference for site supervisors and construction engineers.

title: National Building Code – Handbook
description: Handbook accompanying the National Building Code explaining provisions and providing guidance.
notes: Companion to NBC for practical application.

title: Handbook for Structural Engineers – Structural Steel Sections
description: Provides section properties, tables and design aids for structural steel sections used in India.
notes: Essential reference table book for steel structure designers.

title: Handbook on Methods of Measurement of Building Works
description: Provides standard methods of measurement for different items of building construction work.
notes: Standard reference for measurement of all building works.

title: Handbook on Functional Requirements of Buildings
description: Covers functional requirements including space planning, lighting, ventilation and acoustic requirements for buildings.
notes: Useful for architectural planning and space optimization.

title: Building Code Requirements for Structural Concrete
description: Comprehensive US building code for structural concrete covering design, materials, construction and inspection.
notes: Most widely referenced concrete design code internationally.

title: Specifications for Structural Concrete
description: Specifications for construction of structural concrete covering materials, mixing, placing, curing and finishing.
notes: Intended for use as a reference document in project specifications.

title: Standard Practice for Selecting Proportions for Normal Concrete
description: Provides standard method for proportioning concrete mixtures to meet desired workability and strength.
notes: The standard ACI method for mix design, widely used globally.

title: Control of Cracking in Concrete Structures
description: Provides guidance on causes and control of cracking in concrete structures.
notes: Essential reference for understanding and preventing concrete cracking.

title: Code Requirements for Environmental Engineering Concrete Structures
description: Code for design of concrete structures used to contain or process water and wastewater.
notes: US equivalent of IS 3370 for liquid retaining structures.

title: Guide for the Design and Construction of Structural Concrete Reinforced with FRP Bars
description: Provides design recommendations for concrete reinforced with fiber-reinforced polymer (FRP) bars.
notes: FRP bars are non-corrosive alternative to steel reinforcement.

title: Building Code Requirements and Specification for Masonry Structures
description: US building code for design and construction of masonry structures.
notes: Joint code by ACI, ASCE and TMS for masonry design.

title: Code Requirements for Assessment, Repair, and Rehabilitation of Existing Concrete Structures
description: Code for evaluation and rehabilitation of existing concrete structures.
notes: First ACI code specifically for existing structure assessment and repair.

title: Standard Specification for Portland Cement
description: Covers eight types of portland cement including general use, moderate sulfate resistant and high early strength types.
notes: Type I/II most common; Type V for sulfate-resistant applications.

title: Standard Specification for Concrete Aggregates
description: Specifies requirements for fine and coarse aggregates for use in concrete.
notes: US standard equivalent to IS 383.

title: Standard Specification for Deformed and Plain Carbon-Steel Bars for Concrete Reinforcement
description: Specifies requirements for deformed and plain carbon-steel bars used as reinforcement in concrete.
notes: Grade 60 (420 MPa) is most commonly used. Equivalent to IS 1786 Fe415/Fe500.

title: Standard Test Methods for Deep Foundation Elements Under Static Axial Compressive Load
description: Covers procedures for static load testing of deep foundation elements.
notes: Multiple test methods including maintained load and quick load tests.

title: Eurocode 2: Design of Concrete Structures – General Rules and Rules for Buildings
description: European standard for design of concrete structures covering materials, structural analysis and detailing.
notes: Part of the Eurocode suite, widely referenced internationally.

title: Eurocode 3: Design of Steel Structures – General Rules and Rules for Buildings
description: European standard for design of steel structures including cross-section classification and member design.
notes: Comprehensive steel design code based on limit state philosophy.

title: Eurocode 7: Geotechnical Design – General Rules
description: European standard for geotechnical design covering foundations, retaining structures and embankments.
notes: Introduces reliability-based approach to geotechnical design.

title: Eurocode 8: Design of Structures for Earthquake Resistance – General Rules
description: European standard for seismic design of buildings and civil engineering works.
notes: Comprehensive seismic design framework for European practice.

title: Structural Use of Concrete – Code of Practice for Design and Construction
description: British standard for structural use of concrete in buildings and civil engineering works (now superseded by Eurocode 2).
notes: Largely replaced by Eurocode 2 (EN 1992) in UK since 2010.

title: Structural Use of Steelwork in Building – Code of Practice for Design
description: British standard for structural use of steelwork in buildings (now superseded by Eurocode 3).
notes: Superseded by Eurocode 3 (EN 1993) in UK practice.

title: Quality Management Systems – Requirements
description: Specifies requirements for a quality management system for organizations seeking to demonstrate consistent product/service quality.
notes: Required by major clients for contractor prequalification.

title: Environmental Management Systems – Requirements with Guidance
description: Specifies requirements for an environmental management system to improve environmental performance.
notes: Increasingly mandated for large infrastructure projects.

title: Buildings and Civil Engineering Works – Vocabulary – General Terms
description: Defines general terms used in the field of buildings and civil engineering works.
notes: Reference for standardized terminology in civil engineering.

title: Criteria for Earthquake Resistant Design – Bridges and Retaining Walls
description: Specifies seismic design requirements for bridges and retaining structures.
notes: Part of IS 1893 series covering specific structure types.

title: Dimensions for Hot Rolled Steel Beam, Column, Channel and Angle Sections
description: Specifies dimensions and section properties of hot rolled steel sections used in India.
notes: Provides standard Indian steel section designations (IS sections).

title: Methods of Physical Tests for Hydraulic Cement
description: Specifies methods of tests for consistency, setting time, soundness, compressive strength of hydraulic cement.
notes: Multi-part standard covering all cement test methods.

title: Method of Test for Splitting Tensile Strength of Concrete Cylinder
description: Specifies the split cylinder test method for determining tensile strength of concrete.
notes: Also called Brazilian test. Indirect measure of concrete tensile strength.

title: Method of Non-Destructive Testing of Concrete – Ultrasonic Pulse Velocity
description: Specifies use of ultrasonic pulse velocity (UPV) method for assessing concrete quality non-destructively.
notes: UPV test assesses uniformity and relative quality of concrete.

title: Method of Non-Destructive Testing of Concrete – Rebound Hammer
description: Specifies use of rebound hammer (Schmidt hammer) for non-destructive estimation of concrete strength.
notes: Quick and inexpensive but less accurate than core testing.

title: Ready Mixed Concrete – Determination of Fresh Concrete Workability by Flow Table
description: Specifies flow table test method for determining workability of fresh concrete.
notes: Used for concrete with very high workability where slump test is inadequate.

title: Construction of Floor and Roof with Joists and Filler Blocks
description: Code of practice for construction of floors and roofs using precast joists and filler blocks.
notes: Economical slab construction method using precast elements.

title: Methods of Sampling and Test for Water Used in Industry
description: Specifies methods of sampling and testing water used in industries.
notes: IS 456 requires water used in concrete to meet IS 3025 requirements.

title: Fly Ash for Use as Pozzolana and Admixture – Specification
description: Specifies requirements for fly ash used as pozzolana in cement and concrete.
notes: Fly ash replacement up to 35% allowed in concrete as per IS 456.

title: Compression Testing Machines – Requirements
description: Specifies requirements for compression testing machines used for testing construction materials.
notes: Calibration of CTM is essential for accurate strength results.

title: Geometric Design Standards for Urban Roads
description: Provides geometric design standards for urban roads including lane widths, medians, footpaths and parking.
notes: Design standards differ from rural roads due to pedestrian and mixed traffic.

title: Manual of Specifications and Standards for Expressways
description: Comprehensive specifications and standards for design and construction of expressways.
notes: Covers geometric, pavement, bridge and safety requirements for expressways.

title: Criteria for Earthquake Resistant Design – Liquid Retaining Tanks
description: Specifies seismic design requirements for liquid retaining tanks and vessels.
notes: Accounts for impulsive and convective forces due to liquid sloshing.

title: Seismic Evaluation and Strengthening of Existing Reinforced Concrete Buildings
description: Guidelines for seismic evaluation and retrofit of existing RC buildings.
notes: Important for upgrading pre-code buildings to meet current seismic requirements.

title: Specification for Precast Concrete Paving Blocks
description: Specifies requirements for precast concrete paving blocks used in pedestrian and light vehicular areas.
notes: Increasingly used for urban paving due to permeability benefits.

title: Dimensions for Steel Plates, Sheets, Strips and Flats for General Engineering Purposes
description: Specifies standard dimensions for steel plates, sheets and strips for engineering applications.
notes: Standard thickness series for procurement and design reference.

title: Hollow Steel Sections for Structural Use – Specification
description: Specifies requirements for cold and hot formed hollow steel sections (tubes) for structural use.
notes: RHS, SHS and CHS sections with better aesthetic and torsional properties.

title: Building Design and Construction – Accessibility and Usability of Built Environment
description: Specifies requirements for accessibility of buildings for persons with disabilities.
notes: Mandated by Rights of Persons with Disabilities Act 2016.

title: Safety Code for Excavation Work
description: Provides safety requirements for excavation work in construction projects.
notes: Critical for preventing excavation collapses and worker safety.

title: Specification for Prestressing Anchorages
description: Specifies requirements for anchorage systems used in prestressed concrete construction.
notes: Covers both internal and external tendon anchorage systems.

title: Specification for Uncoated Stress Relieved Strand for Prestressed Concrete
description: Specifies requirements for high tensile steel strands used in prestressed concrete.
notes: 7-wire strand is most commonly used prestressing tendon.

title: Recommended Practice for Treatment of Embankment and Road Formation
description: Covers treatment and construction methods for road embankments and formation.
notes: Specifies compaction standards and material requirements for embankments.

title: Code of Practice for Extreme Weather Concreting – Concreting in Hot Weather
description: Covers precautions and practices for concreting in hot and dry weather conditions.
notes: India's hot climate makes this standard important for quality concrete.

title: Code of Practice for Extreme Weather Concreting – Concreting in Cold Weather
description: Covers precautions and practices for concreting in cold weather conditions to prevent freezing damage.
notes: Important for high altitude and northern Indian construction sites.

title: Centrifugally Cast (Spun) Ductile Iron Pressure Pipes – Specification
description: Specifies requirements for ductile iron pipes used in water supply and sewerage systems.
notes: DI pipes are replacing cast iron pipes due to better strength and durability.

title: Mild Steel Tubes, Tubulars and Other Wrought Steel Fittings – Specification
description: Specifies requirements for mild steel tubes and fittings for water, gas and sanitary services.
notes: GI pipes most common for domestic water supply.

title: Plastics Piping System for Soil and Waste Discharge – UPVC
description: Specifies requirements for UPVC pipes and fittings for soil and waste discharge applications.
notes: Lightweight, corrosion-resistant alternative to CI pipes for drainage.

title: Electric Traction Lifts – Code of Practice
description: Covers requirements for planning, design and installation of electric traction lifts in buildings.
notes: Mandatory for buildings above certain heights as per NBC.

title: Bitumen Felts for Waterproofing and Damp Proofing – Specification
description: Specifies requirements for bitumen felts used for waterproofing roofs, basements and damp proofing.
notes: Essential for watertight construction.

title: Specification for Integral Cement Waterproofing Compounds
description: Specifies requirements for integral waterproofing compounds added to cement concrete and mortar.
notes: Integral compounds reduce permeability of concrete.

title: Pulverized Fuel Ash – Lime Products – Specification
description: Specification for fly ash lime products used as building materials.
notes: Eco-friendly alternative to clay bricks using industrial byproduct.

title: Concrete Masonry Units – Hollow and Solid Concrete Blocks
description: Specifies requirements for hollow and solid load-bearing and non-load-bearing concrete blocks.
notes: Faster construction than brick masonry with larger block sizes.

title: Specification for Two-Part Polysulphide Based Sealants
description: Specifies requirements for polysulphide sealants used for joints in construction.
notes: Essential for sealing movement joints in concrete structures.

title: Recommendations for Detailing of Reinforcement in Reinforced Concrete Works
description: Provides recommendations for detailing of reinforcement including lap lengths, hooks and bends.
notes: Practical guidance on placing reinforcement in RCC members.

title: Standard Test Methods for Fire Tests of Building Construction and Materials
description: Covers procedures for fire resistance testing of building assemblies and materials.
notes: Standard fire exposure curve used as basis for fire resistance ratings.

title: Methods of Test for Aggregates – Specific Gravity, Density, Absorption and Bulking of Sand
description: Specifies tests for specific gravity, bulk density, water absorption and bulking of aggregates.
notes: Used in concrete mix design for moisture correction calculations.

title: Tentative Specifications for Sub-bases for Flexible Pavement
description: Specifies requirements for sub-base materials and construction for flexible pavements.
notes: Granular sub-base (GSB) is the primary sub-base type used in India.

title: Selection and Design of Belt Conveyors – Code of Practice
description: Provides guidelines for selection, design and operation of belt conveyors in construction and industry.
notes: Used in aggregate handling at concrete plants and construction sites.

title: Methods of Sampling and Test for Water – Chlorides
description: Specifies test method for determination of chloride content in water samples.
notes: High chloride in mixing water can cause corrosion of steel reinforcement.

title: Recommendation for Design and Construction of Underground Structures
description: Provides recommendations for design and construction of underground structures and tunnels.
notes: India's tunneling activity increasing with metro and highway projects.

title: Project Preparation Manual for Bridges
description: Manual for preparation of project reports and DPR for road bridge projects.
notes: Used for preparation of detailed project reports for bridge construction.

title: Load Testing of Piles
description: Specifies procedures for load testing of pile foundations to verify design capacity.
notes: Maintained load test and cyclic load test procedures covered.

title: Criteria for Design of Reinforced Concrete Bins and Silos – Assessment of Loads
description: Covers assessment of loads including bulk solid pressure for design of silos and bins.
notes: Hopper pressure calculations critical for silo design.

title: Reinforcement Couplers for Mechanical Splices of Bars in Concrete
description: Specifies requirements for mechanical couplers used to splice reinforcing bars in concrete.
notes: Threaded couplers eliminate need for lap splices in congested areas.

title: Tolerances for Fabrication of Steel Structures
description: Specifies dimensional tolerances for fabrication of steel structures and components.
notes: Essential for ensuring fit-up quality of steel structural connections.

title: Standard Specifications and Code of Practice for Road Bridges – Steel Road Bridges
description: Code of practice for design of steel road bridges.
notes: Covers design of plate girder, truss and composite steel bridges.

title: Steel Reinforcement – Testing Procedures
description: Specifies testing procedures for steel reinforcement bars including tension, bend and rebend tests.
notes: Ensures rebar meets minimum strength and ductility requirements.

title: False/Raised Flooring Systems – Guidelines
description: Provides guidelines for design and installation of false flooring systems in buildings.
notes: Essential for buildings requiring under-floor cable and HVAC management.

title: Code of Practice for Construction with Large Precast Concrete Panels
description: Provides guidelines for construction using large precast concrete panels for floors and walls.
notes: Mass housing using precast panels offers speed and quality advantages.

title: Fire Safety of Buildings – Details of Construction
description: Covers fire safety requirements for construction details including fire stops, fire doors and compartmentation.
notes: Compartmentation limits fire spread within buildings.

title: Criteria for Structural Safety of Tall Concrete Buildings
description: Provides criteria for structural safety of tall concrete buildings above 50m height.
notes: India's first dedicated tall building design standard.

title: Safety Code for Handling and Storage of Building Materials
description: Provides safety guidelines for handling and storage of various building materials at construction sites.
notes: Essential for construction site safety management.

title: Organization and Digitization of Information about Buildings – BIM
description: International standard for managing information across the whole life cycle of a built asset using BIM.
notes: Increasingly mandated for government infrastructure projects globally.

title: Green Building Rating – Code of Practice
description: Provides framework and criteria for green building rating and certification.
notes: India's own green building standard alongside IGBC/GRIHA rating systems.

title: Geometric Design of Grade Separators
description: Provides geometric design standards for grade separators including interchanges and flyovers.
notes: Covers cloverleaf, diamond, trumpet and other interchange types.

title: Specification for Micro Silica for Use with Ordinary Portland Cement
description: Specifies requirements for micro silica (silica fume) used as supplementary cementitious material.
notes: Improves strength, durability and reduces permeability significantly.

title: Design and Construction of Pile Foundations – Under-Reamed Piles
description: Covers design and construction of under-reamed pile foundations commonly used in expansive soil areas.
notes: Very common in Deccan plateau regions with expansive black cotton soil.

title: Code of Practice for Selection, Installation and Maintenance of Transformers
description: Provides guidelines for electrical transformers in buildings and infrastructure.
notes: Essential for buildings with high power demand requiring substations.

title: Uncoated Stress-Relieved Low Relaxation Seven-Ply Strand for Prestressed Concrete
description: Specifies requirements for low relaxation prestressing strands with improved properties.
notes: Low relaxation strands have replaced normal relaxation strands in modern practice.
